scripts.build: bun run build:shared && bun run --cwd apps/desktop build
scripts.format: prettier --write . --ignore-path .gitignore && cd tg-webm-converter && poetry run black .
scripts.test: bun run test:shared && bun run --cwd apps/desktop test && cd tg-webm-converter && poetry run pytest
scripts.lint: bun run lint:shared && bun run --cwd apps/desktop lint && cd tg-webm-converter && poetry run pytest tests/test_gui_api.py -q
